lines.speaker: Alon
lines.line: You look tired, Finn. Did the road treat you poorly?

lines.speaker: Finn
lines.line: Road treats everyone poorly. Some just pretend it doesn't bother them.

lines.speaker: Alon
lines.line: Perhaps. But you stopped to help that merchant yesterday.

lines.speaker: Finn
lines.line: Only because he had good elderflower. Don't read charity into it.
